description_long: This is a large, rustic cabin set on a grassy plot, featuring a complex, multi-gabled hip roof with deep overhangs and exposed wooden beams. The exterior is clad in natural wood, with stone accents visible at the base and around the porch columns, giving it a lodge-like appearance. Multiple large windows are distributed asymmetrically across the facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front of the cabin boasts a prominent covered porch supported by thick timber posts, while the rear and sides have additional smaller overhangs and entryways. The structure appears to be single-story but expansive, with a sprawling footprint and several interconnected roof sections. The overall design blends harmoniously with natural surroundings, evoking a sense of warmth and shelter.
description: A sprawling rustic cabin with a multi-gabled hip roof, wood and stone exterior, large windows, and a prominent covered porch set on a grassy plot.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance with a large covered porch, visible timber supports, and a cluster of windows beneath the main roof gable.
description_view_1: From this angle, the rear facade is visible, showing a wide expanse of windows and a secondary entrance under a smaller roof overhang.
description_view_2: This side view reveals the cabin's elongated footprint, multiple roof sections, and a mix of window sizes along the facade.
description_view_3: This perspective emphasizes the depth of the roof overhangs, the stone base, and the integration of the porch with the main structure.
attribute_roof_type: multi-gabled hip roof with deep overhangs and exposed timber beams
attribute_window_arrangement: Multiple large and medium-sized rectangular windows arranged asymmetrically across all visible facades, with some grouped in clusters and others spaced individually
attribute_door_placement: One main entrance door centered under the front porch, with at least one secondary door visible at the rear under a smaller overhang
